details: Confirmed: tensix_sync() is inline in tt-llk ckernel.h (wh/bh/qsr), reachable from compute kernels via compute_kernel_api.h -> common_globals.h -> ckernel.h. 3 callers in ops: moe.cpp/sampling.cpp use UNPACK(tensix_sync()) for issue #9370; deepseek kernel_utils.hpp uses bare tensix_sync() in sync_riscs_enter. No wrapper/helper in kernel_lib. CB wait_front on output CB after in-place op blocks UNPACK until PACK pushes, confirmed via llk_wait_tiles polling tiles_received. SDPA stage 7 comment at line 314 explicitly documents UNPACK-runs-ahead-of-PACK race.
